column3: Princes Highway between Green Point Road Stringybark Place(Suburb:Pambula, Region:South Coast)
column14: Reduced speed limit; Allow extra travel time
column15: Work will be carried out between 6am and 6pm every weekday and between 6am and 5pm every second Saturday.Single-lane closures will be in place. Alternating (stop/slow) traffic conditions will be in place to allow motorists to pass in one direction at a time.Traffic controllers will be on-site to direct motorists.Residents within the work area will have access to their properties at all times under the guidance of traffic controllers. Emergency service providers and deliveries to the village will also be maintained.Motorists are advised to allow approximately 10 minutes of additional travel time.

column3: Towamba Road near Ben Boyd Road (Suburb:Towamba, Region:South Coast)
column14: Check signage; Expect delays
column15: Flood restoration works on Towamba Road. The site is located near the intersection of Towamba Road and Ben Boyd Road, about 14 kilometres from the Princes Highway, south of Eden.Stage 2 - Saturday 12 April (afternoon) to Monday 28 April (morning)A single lane will be open to light vehicles. Portable traffic lights will be in place allowing road users to pass in one direction at a time. Road users should expect delays of up to 15 minutes during these times and a 5T gross limit will be in place with restrictions to caravans and trailers.Stage 3 - Monday 28 April to Friday 30 MayA single lane with portable traffic lights will remain open to allow road users to pass in one direction at a time between 6:30am to 9am and from 3:00pm to 6:00pm Monday to Saturday. Road users should expect delays of up to 30 minutes during these times.The road will be under a full closure outside of these hours including overnight and between 9:00am to 3:00pm Monday to Saturday. During this stage the final 30 metre section of the retaining wall will be built, backfilled and the road surface resealed.
column16: During periods of full closure, the recommended detour is via Burragate Road and Mount Darragh Road.

column3: Storey Avenue - Princes Highway (Suburb:Eden, Region:South Coast)
column14: Allow extra travel time; Reduce your speed
column15: As part of an ongoing infrastructure upgrade program, contractors will be carrying out stormwater and road upgrade works along Storey Avenue and part of the Princes Highway. Night works will be carried out approximately three to five nights per week, between 6pm and 6am. Some kerb works will occur during daylight hours as needed. Changed traffic conditions will be in place and traffic control will be on-site to help road users. Where possible, please advise the crew members on-site of where you need to go and assistance will be provided.Road users should expect minor delays.
